pf2e-skill-issue.note-placeholder: Text field to keep additional information

granted-by.background:
{proficiency}

This proficiency is automatically provided by the Background Item. This only considers skills listed in the details tab, and not rule elements.
granted-by.class:
{proficiency}

This proficiency is automatically provided by the Class Item. This only considers skills listed in the details tab, and not rule elements.
granted-by.source:
{proficiency}

This proficiency was manually set in the source data on the character's sheet.

locked-because.no-valid-upgrade-rank: The skill is already at the highest proficiency level for this character level.
locked-because.exhausted-allowance: You have reached the maximum number of improvements you can choose at this level.

roguelike.name: Roguelike Mode
roguelike.hint: Treat every class as if they were a rogue - grants a skill increase at every level.

plan-ahead.name: Plot the Future
plan-ahead.hint: Allows preplanning all allocations up to level 20 in advance. They won't take effect until you reach the required level.

unlimited.name: Unlimited Choice
unlimited.hint: Disables allocation cap on every level. It's up to the user to keep track of them.

mark-background-class.name: Mark Background and Class
mark-background-class.hint: In addition to marking skills improved in source, will also mark those that are improved by character's background and class. Defaults to false, as it currently ignores rule elements and only uses data from the details tab, and may seem inconsistent.
